title: Avoid using FetchType.EAGER
description: Using FetchType.EAGER in JPA can lead to performance issues and unexpected data loading. Prefer FetchType.LAZY to load related entities only when needed, improving efficiency and reducing memory usage.
recommendation: Replace FetchType.EAGER with FetchType.LAZY in entity relationships unless eager loading is strictly required.

checks.message: Replace FetchType.EAGER with FetchType.LAZY in entity relationships unless eager loading is strictly required.
